department: BWSSB - Bangalore Water Supply and Sewerage Board
description: Complete knowledge base for BWSSB water supply department - used for RAG-based grievance resolution

policies.rule: Water supply must be restored within 48 hours of complaint registration
Compensation applicable if water supply delay exceeds 72 hours
Emergency water tanker must be provided within 6 hours for critical shortage
Scheduled maintenance must be announced 24 hours in advance
Water quality complaints must be addressed within 24 hours with lab testing
New water connection must be provided within 30 days of application
Pipeline leakage must be repaired within 24 hours of complaint
Billing disputes must be resolved within 15 working days

common_grievances.resolution: Call 1916 and register complaint. Emergency tanker available within 6 hours. Supply restored within 48 hours.
Report to ward office. Engineer will inspect pipeline within 24 hours. Repair within 48 hours.
Call 1916 immediately. Lab testing within 24 hours. Do not drink water until cleared. Emergency supply provided.
Call 1916. Repair team dispatched within 4 hours. Road damage repaired by BBMP separately.
Visit BWSSB office with previous bills. Dispute resolved within 15 working days. Excess amount adjusted in next bill.
Report to BWSSB. Meter inspection within 7 days. Faulty meter replaced within 15 days.

faq.question: How do I register a water supply complaint?
faq.answer: Call BWSSB helpline 1916 or visit bwssb.gov.in. Provide your ward number, address and contact number. You will receive a complaint reference number via SMS.

faq.question: How long will it take to restore water supply?
faq.answer: Water supply is restored within 48 hours of complaint. For emergencies, a water tanker is provided within 6 hours.

faq.question: What if my complaint is not resolved in 48 hours?
faq.answer: Escalate to Assistant Executive Engineer at the division office. If still unresolved, escalate to Executive Engineer at the zone office.

faq.question: How do I apply for a new water connection?
faq.answer: Apply online at bwssb.gov.in or visit the nearest BWSSB office. New connection provided within 30 days of application with required documents.
